'''âf-dh-b-sh''' ('''kafadhbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teehee|teehee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teehee|teehee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-dh-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafadhbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadhbeshoko|thifadhbeshoko]] || [[word:jifadhbeshoko|jifadhbeshoko]] || [[word:shifadhbeshoko|shifadhbeshoko]] || [[word:kifadhbeshoko|kifadhbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadhbeshoko|thuthufadhbeshoko]] || [[word:jujufadhbeshoko|jujufadhbeshoko]] || [[word:shushufadhbeshoko|shushufadhbeshoko]] || [[word:kukufadhbeshoko|kukufadhbeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
